---
name: Suggestion
about: Suggest an idea for the modpack!
title: Untitled suggestion
labels: enhancement
assignees: katzzotik

---

**Is your suggestion related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**(If it is related to a problem) Describe the solution you'd like and alternative solutions**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and what alternative solutions there are.

**(If it is not related to a problem) Describe your suggestion!**
Describe your suggestion clearly.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here if you need to.
